subject: enron credit inc. - request for urgent information

emails.subject: Re: Enron Credit Inc. - request for urgent information
emails.subject_base: Enron Credit Inc. - request for urgent information
emails.body: Re: Enron Credit Inc. request for urgent information Sara: 1. Ms. Lewis' information does not appear to be in the lotus notes entry for ECI-Bear that I have used for the past two weeks. Re: lotus notes, however, I certainly could be wrong. If you are certain, please point out or forward. 2. You indicated in our meeting in my office that someone represented that Bear does not need the standard accompanying documents to open the account. As per my email request yesterday evening, can you confirm who determined this (if it was not you) so that I know what is going on and what I can represent in talking with the people at Bear? Much thanx, Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 04/02/2001 05:09 PM

emails.subject: Re: Enron Credit Inc. - request for urgent information
emails.subject_base: Enron Credit Inc. - request for urgent information
emails.body: Cheryl: 1. Check the comments for Ms. Lewis' information. 2. No, I indicated that the assignment and account agreement were essential. I did not say that accompanying docs were not required. I suggested that someone should verify with Cheryl Lewis. Often, the broker will rely on our relationship and subsequent delivery of accompanying docs. This must be determined on an ad hoc basis. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Sent by: Cheryl Nelson@ENRON 04/03/2001 08:53 AM

emails.subject: Re: Enron Credit Inc. - request for urgent information
emails.subject_base: Enron Credit Inc. - request for urgent information
emails.body: Sara, as I stated below, I checked my lotus notes entry and did not see it. This could be because lotus notes is in disarray or just in the stress we are all face being under the gun, I am overlooking it. But we all agreed yesterday that time is of the essence and this matter is now of the most critical importance so if you see the information or otherwise have it, particularly because you have spoken with her, the please, forward the information so that we can get the guaranty executed. Thank you. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 04/03/2001 09:03 AM
